title: TIA follow-up documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports clinician-led secondary-prevention planning after specialist confirmation of TIA without mapping medicine names or doses.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-led secondary-prevention planning after specialist-confirmed TIA for TIA follow-up; no decision is generated.

source.title: Stroke and transient ischaemic attack in over 16s: diagnosis and initial management
source.population: People aged over 16 years with suspected or confirmed stroke or transient ischaemic attack.
source.setting: Initial assessment, specialist TIA assessment, imaging, and secondary-prevention planning.
source.exclusions: Exact for TIA specialist assessment, imaging, and secondary-prevention documentation; partial for a broad long-term stroke or TIA follow-up workflow and not directly validated for UAE pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendation 1.1.7 — secondary prevention after confirmed TIA

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician-led secondary-prevention planning after specialist confirmation of TIA without mapping medicine names or doses.

assessment.text: Supports clinician-reviewed MRI and carotid imaging in the specified specialist-assessment context.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-reviewed brain and carotid imaging context for TIA follow-up; no decision is generated.
